query: Scan the repo for committed secrets, including history.
expected_behavior: Uses the expressions config (.betterleaks.toml) — copies templates/betterleaks.toml if absent
Runs betterleaks dir . and betterleaks git . with --redact (working tree + history)
Runs scripts/betterleaks-to-findings.mjs to map the report(s) to findings[]
Never emits the cleartext secret — values are redacted; live-validated finds are tagged
Each real find is critical and raises [GATE]

query: Convert this betterleaks report to findings.
expected_behavior: Maps each leak to SECR-* (e.g. aws→SECR-CLOUD, private-key→SECR-PRIVKEY)
Messages contain no cleartext secret (redacted) and the output is schema-valid
Surfaces betterleaks validation status (LIVE) without printing the value

query: We removed the leaked key in a new commit — are we safe?
expected_behavior: Explains removal alone is insufficient because history retains the secret
Recommends rotating the secret and purging history
Treats a history-only secret as critical (SECR-HISTORY)
